recommendations.title: Lady Snowblood
recommendations.overview: Yuki's family is nearly wiped out before she is born due to the machinations of a band of criminals. These criminals kidnap and brutalize her mother but leave her alive. Later her mother ends up in prison with only revenge to keep her alive. She crea

recommendations.title: Cast Away
recommendations.overview: Chuck Noland, a top international manager for FedEx, and Kelly, a Ph.D. student, are in love and heading towards marriage. Then Chuck's plane to Malaysia crashes at sea during a terrible storm. He's the only survivor, and finds himself marooned on a

recommendations.title: They're Watching
recommendations.overview: An American TV crew gets trapped in a centuries-old web of revenge, horror, and blood, when their home improvement show is attacked by angry Eastern European villagers out to kill the show's star.

recommendations.title: Savageland
recommendations.overview: When a small town near the Arizona-Mexico border is wiped out overnight, suspicion falls on the lone survivor. But a roll of photos the survivor took that night tells a different story.
recommendations.director: David Whelan, Phil Guidry, Simon Herbert

recommendations.title: Death Note

recommendations.title: Lake Placid: The Final Chapter
recommendations.overview: Black Lake is now a crocodile sanctuary, surrounded by an electric fence. When the fence is left open, a high-school bus unknowingly enters the park. It's up to Reba and the Sheriff to save the kids from becoming crocodile food.

recommendations.title: Heartburn
recommendations.overview: She's a magazine writer who gives up her career for love and family. He's a playboy newspaper columnist who can't quite give up his old tricks. And if that combination doesn't give a relationship heartburn, nothing will.

recommendations.title: Stargate: Continuum
recommendations.overview: Ba'al travels back in time and prevents the Stargate program from being started. SG-1 must somehow restore history.
